description: Provider-neutral Open Cowork Cloud and Gateway operational metric contract.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_http_requests_total
metrics.description: HTTP request rate and error basis by role, route, method, and status.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_http_request_duration_ms
metrics.description: Cloud HTTP request latency in milliseconds.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_session_create_duration_ms
metrics.description: Session creation latency. Emit from Cloud session service or derive from request/span data.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_prompt_enqueue_duration_ms
metrics.description: Prompt command enqueue latency. Emit from prompt enqueue paths or derive from request/span data.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_command_queue_depth_estimate
metrics.description: Bounded runnable-session backlog estimate from the worker command loop. It is capped by the worker scan batch and should be paired with queue-age signals for scaling decisions.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_command_oldest_age_ms
metrics.description: Oldest pending command age. May be emitted by DB collector or dashboard SQL.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_runnable_session_claim_duration_ms
metrics.description: Duration of worker runnable-session claim scans in milliseconds.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_runnable_sessions_claimed_total
metrics.description: Runnable session leases claimed by workers, labeled by claim status.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_worker_lease_claims_total
metrics.description: Worker lease claim attempts by status.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_worker_lease_renewals_total
metrics.description: Successful worker lease renewals.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_worker_expired_leases_reaped_total
metrics.description: Expired session worker leases recovered by the managed-work reaper.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_worker_expired_lease_reaper_drain_cap_hits_total
metrics.description: Worker ticks where expired session lease recovery exhausted the configured bounded drain cap.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_worker_stale_owner_rejections_total
metrics.description: Stale worker ownership or checkpoint/projection rejection signals.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_worker_loop_duration_ms
metrics.description: Worker command loop duration.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_worker_loop_failures_total
metrics.description: Worker loop failures before the next poll can retry.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_worker_lease_denials_total
metrics.description: Worker lease denials caused by entitlement, quota, or capacity checks.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_worker_commands_processed_total
metrics.description: Worker command execution completions by status.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_worker_command_duration_ms
metrics.description: Worker command execution duration in milliseconds by status.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_scheduler_claims_total
metrics.description: Due workflow claims by scheduler.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_scheduler_expired_claims_reaped_total
metrics.description: Expired queued workflow start claims recovered by the scheduler reaper.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_scheduler_expired_claim_reaper_drain_cap_hits_total
metrics.description: Scheduler ticks where expired workflow-claim recovery exhausted the configured bounded drain cap.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_scheduler_failures_total
metrics.description: Scheduler loop failures.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_projection_lag_events
metrics.description: Difference between latest durable event sequence and projected session sequence.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_sse_connections
metrics.description: Active cloud workspace/session SSE connections.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_quota_rejections_total
metrics.description: Quota or rate-limit denials by policy code.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_auth_failures_total
metrics.description: Authentication failures and backoff claims by auth source.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_byok_reveal_failures_total
metrics.description: BYOK plaintext reveal failures without including secret material.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_scheduler_loop_duration_ms
metrics.description: Scheduler loop wall-clock duration in milliseconds; absent/zero feeds the SchedulerStalled alert.

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_runtime_cache_close_failures_total
metrics.description: Worker runtime-cache evictions that failed to close a runtime (leaked OpenCode child/workspace).

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_otlp_dropped_records_total
metrics.description: OTLP spans/metrics dropped on telemetry-queue overflow (observability degraded).

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_auth_accounting_errors_total
metrics.description: Auth rate-limit/backoff bookkeeping failures (security throttling may not be enforced).

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_object_store_operations_total
metrics.description: Object-store read/write/list/delete operations by cloud_object_store_kind + operation, tagged status=ok|error (errors are a status filter).

metrics.name: open_cowork_cloud_object_store_operation_duration_ms
metrics.description: Object-store operation latency in milliseconds by cloud_object_store_kind + operation + status.

metrics.name: pg_up
metrics.description: Postgres exporter availability. Provided by the deployer's managed database exporter.

metrics.name: pg_stat_activity_count
metrics.description: Postgres active connection count. Provided by the deployer's managed database exporter.

metrics.name: pg_settings_max_connections
metrics.description: Postgres maximum connection setting. Provided by the deployer's managed database exporter.

metrics.name: open_cowork_gateway_incoming_messages_total
metrics.description: Inbound channel messages handled.

metrics.name: open_cowork_gateway_deliveries_received_total
metrics.description: Cloud channel deliveries received by gateway.

metrics.name: open_cowork_gateway_deliveries_sent_total
metrics.description: Cloud channel deliveries sent to provider.

metrics.name: open_cowork_gateway_delivery_retries_total
metrics.description: Channel deliveries scheduled for retry.

metrics.name: open_cowork_gateway_delivery_sheds_total
metrics.description: Deliveries shed because the local dispatcher queue hit its cap (re-served by the cloud); a sustained-overload backpressure signal.

metrics.name: open_cowork_gateway_delivery_dead_letters_total
metrics.description: Channel deliveries dead-lettered.

metrics.name: open_cowork_gateway_delivery_latency_ms
metrics.description: Gateway delivery handling latency in milliseconds (cloud delivery received to channel send). Use histogram_quantile over the _bucket series; the per-provider open_cowork_gateway_provider_delivery_latency_ms histogram carries provider_id/provider_kind labels.

metrics.name: open_cowork_gateway_provider_delivery_latency_ms
metrics.description: Per-provider delivery handling latency in milliseconds, labelled provider_id/provider_kind.

metrics.name: open_cowork_gateway_providers
metrics.description: Count of configured active channel providers; the GatewayNoProviders alert fires when this drops below 1.

metrics.name: open_cowork_gateway_session_streams
metrics.description: Active gateway session event streams.

metrics.name: open_cowork_gateway_stream_reconnects_total
metrics.description: Gateway stream reconnects after cloud SSE or render failures.

metrics.name: open_cowork_gateway_provider_state
metrics.description: Provider lifecycle state by configured provider id, provider kind, and state.

metrics.name: open_cowork_gateway_provider_inbound_failures_total
metrics.description: Inbound provider messages that failed before completion by configured provider id and kind.

metrics.name: open_cowork_gateway_provider_delivery_retries_total
metrics.description: Channel deliveries marked for retry by configured provider id and kind.

metrics.name: open_cowork_gateway_provider_delivery_dead_letters_total
metrics.description: Channel deliveries dead-lettered by configured provider id and kind.

metrics.name: open_cowork_gateway_provider_webhook_requests_total
metrics.description: Webhook requests received by configured provider id and kind.
